recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Firebase
recommendations.overview: Set during the Vietnam war, Firebase follows American soldier Hines through an ever-deepening web of science fiction madness.

recommendations.title: Ghosts of War
recommendations.overview: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

recommendations.title: Lebanon
recommendations.overview: During the First Lebanon War in 1982, a lone tank and a paratroopers platoon are dispatched to search a hostile town.

recommendations.title: The Dinosaur Project
recommendations.overview: Found footage of an expedition into the Congo jungle where a team of explorers stumbles upon a colony of Dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: The Manchurian Candidate
recommendations.overview: Near the end of the Korean War, a platoon of U.S. soldiers is captured by communists and brainwashed. Following the war, the platoon is returned home, and Sergeant Raymond Shaw is lauded as a hero by the rest of his platoon. However, the platoon comm

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: R-Point
recommendations.overview: On 07 January 1972, the South Korean base in Nha-Trang, Vietnam, receives a radio transmission from a missing platoon presumed dead.
A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.
